name: Asuka Anders (Waifu Academy)
description:
I dont really have anything to say for this bot, i just though her slowburn was peak, and here we are. Anyways enjoy the bot

Intro 1: the normal intro, theres nothing really much to say about this.

Intro 2: Angst, nothing to say about this one as well, its just her past story and lore, her past was shit, try comforting her i guess.

Intro 3: Smut, for those who just wanna and dont give a flying about lore or slowburn

Intro 4: Slowburn, peak i guess but imo intro 5 is the best

Intro 5 (Bonus intro): A mix of everything and wholesome too.

Enjoy and make sure to give your reviews below :)

(You can also request bots below if you like my bots)
